creator: jhein@timing.com
text:
Update opentaxsolver to 6.01 (added upstream 2009-03-06) for
tax year 2008.

The MA, NY & VA state solvers were left out of the build in
the upstream port.  I'm leaving them out until I find out
if that was on purpose or not.  I'm leaving the example
templates for those states in the package list for now.
